message:
fix(server): harden PID hint file writes against symlink TOCTOU attacks

Restrict the PID hint directory to owner-only (0o700) and use atomic
temp-file + rename instead of direct write, preventing attackers from
substituting a symlink between creation and write.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
